unit.comment: // Distributed under the Boost Software License, Version 1.0.
// (See accompanying file LICENSE.txt or copy at

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be (AllOf) composed with the && operator", "[matchers][operators][operator&&]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be (AnyOf) composed with the || operator", "[matchers][operators][operator||]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be composed with both && and ||", "[matchers][operators][operator||][operator&&]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be composed with both && and || - failing", "[matchers][operators][operator||][operator&&][.failing]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be negated (Not) with the ! operator", "[matchers][operators][not]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Matchers can be negated (Not) with the ! operator - failing", "[matchers][operators][not][.failing]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Floating point matchers that are problematic in approvals", "[approvals][matchers][floating-point]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Combining concrete matchers does not use templated matchers", "[matchers][templated]" )

macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "Overloaded comma or address-of operators are not used", "[matchers][templated]" )

macro.name: TEMPLATE_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ( "#2152 - ULP checks between differently signed values were wrong", "[matchers][floating-point][ulp]", float, double )
